name: Rritual Superfoods Inc.
summary: Rritual Superfoods Inc. engages in the development, marketing, sale, and distribution of plant-based products featuring functional mushrooms and adaptogen ingredients. The company offers proprietary dietary and nutritional supplements, as well as beverages containing herbs and other extracts, such as fruits, roots, fungi, and vegetables. Its initial product line under its brand √Ç¬ëRritual' consists of three functional mushroom adaptogen formulations covering chaga, reishi, and lion's mane. The company was formerly known as Rritual Mushrooms Inc. and changed its name to Rritual Superfoods Inc. in November 2020. Rritual Superfoods Inc. The company was founded in 2019 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
